zh.lifeSummary: 當Móur O'Brien於1470年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克阿斯可亞頓時，她的父親Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomond30歲，母親Elizabeth O'Brien20歲。她於大約1490年與Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1550年在愛爾蘭享年80歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Móur O'Brien于1470年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克阿斯可亞頓时，她的父亲Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomond30岁，母亲Elizabeth O'Brien20岁。她于大约1490年与Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1550年在爱尔兰享年80岁，埋葬在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

variants.name: O'Bryon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish William Kevin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bryant  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Briain, see O'Brien .

variants.name: O'Briant
meanings: Irish: variant of O'Brien , with excrescent -t.

variants.name: McBrien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus.
Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

variants.name: O'Bryan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish James Patrick, Padraic.

nameMeanings.name: Móur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Móur O'Brien was born in 1470, in Askeaton, County Limerick, Ireland, her father, Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomond, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth O'Brien, was 20. She married Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond about 1490. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1550, in Ireland, at the age of 80, and was buried in Ireland.

fr.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Móur O'Brien est née en 1470, à Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlande, son père, Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomond, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth O'Brien, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond environ 1490. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1550, à Irlande, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Irlande.

de.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Móur O'Brien 1470 in Askeaton, County Limerick, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomond 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth O'Brien 20. Sie hat um 1490 Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1550 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Irland und wurde in Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Móur O'Brien è nata il nel 1470 nel Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlanda, sua padre, Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomond, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth O'Brien, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond circa 1490. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1550, nel Irlanda, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Móur O'Brienが1470年にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックアスケアトンで生まれた時，父Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomondは30歳，母Elizabeth O'Brienは20歳であった。約1490年にSir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1550年にアイルランドで80歳で死去し，アイルランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 케이슬레an 이 초나이
ko.lifeSummary: Móur O'Brien(이)가 1470년 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 아스케앳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomond(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth O'Brien(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1490년 Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 아일랜드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, Irlanda
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Móur O'Brien nasceu em 1470, em Askeaton, County Limerick, Irlanda, seu pai, Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomond, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth O'Brien, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond aproximadamente 1490. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1550, em Irlanda, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Irlanda.

ru.Caisleáñ Ui Chonaill, County Limerick, I: цеислеan уэи чонеилл, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Móur O'Brien родилась в 1470 г. в местности аскитон, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Mahon O'Brien Earl of Thomond было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth O'Brien, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond около 1490 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1550 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности Ирландия.

Se casó con Sir John FitzThomas Fitzgerald 12th Earl of Desmond aproximadamente 1490. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1550, en Irlanda, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Irlanda.
